quality.rationale: 通过度规系数对坐标的无关性导出协带动量守恒，需结合测地线运动学与张量缩并进行多步代数推导，物理机制清晰且可无缝迁移至任意具有Killing对称性的时空背景

origin.question: (b) For an unaccelerated particle, show that the component of the 4-momentum $\mathbf{P_u}$ is constant, but that $\mathbf{P_v}$ is not.
origin.answer: $P_u$ is constant, while $P_v$ is not constant along the particle's trajectory.
origin.solution: (b) Solving Equations (1) for du and dv gives$$\mathrm {d v} = \mathrm {d x} \cos h u - \mathrm {d t} \sin h u$$$$\mathrm {d} u = v^{- 1} (\mathrm {d} t \cos h u - d x \sin h u)$$and thus for a particle of unit mass,$$\mathbf {P}_{\mathrm {u}} = \mathbf {g}_{\mathrm {u u}} \mathbf {P}^{\mathrm {u}} = - \mathbf {v}^{2} \frac {\mathrm {d} \mathbf {u}}{\mathrm {d} \tau} = - \mathbf {v} \cos h \mathbf {u} \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{\mathrm {d} \tau} + \mathbf {v} \sin h \mathbf {u} \frac {\mathrm {d} \mathbf {x}}{\mathrm {d} \tau} = - \mathbf {x} \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{\mathrm {d} \tau} + \mathbf {t} \frac {\mathrm {d} \mathbf {x}}{\mathrm {d} \tau}.$$For an unaccelerated particle $\mathbf{x} = \text{const.} + \frac{\mathrm{d}\mathbf{x}}{\mathrm{d}t} t$ , and $\mathrm{dt} / \mathrm{d}\tau$ , $\mathrm{dx} / \mathrm{d}\tau$ are also both constant, so$$\mathrm {P_{u}} = \text {c o n s t .} - \mathrm {t} \frac {\mathrm {d x}}{\mathrm {d} t} \frac {\mathrm {d} t}{\mathrm {d} r} + \mathrm {t} \frac {\mathrm {d x}}{\mathrm {d} r} = \text {c o n s t a n t .}$$Now for $\mathbf{P}_{\mathbf{v}}$ , use$$- \mathrm {\bf m}^{2} = \bf P \cdot \bf P = g^{v v} (P_{v})^{2} + g^{u u} (P_{u})^{2} = (P_{v})^{2} - (P_{u})^{2} / v^{2}.$$So, $\mathbf{P}_{\mathbf{v}}^{2} = \mathbf{P}_{\mathbf{u}}^{2} / \mathbf{v}^{2} - \mathbf{m}^{2}$ , which is not constant since in general $\mathbf{v}$ varies along the particle's trajectory. It turns out that whenever the metric coefficient does not depend on some coordinate (in this case $\mathbf{u}$ ), thenthe covariant momentum of that coordinate (here $\mathbf{P_u}$ ) is conserved. (See Problem 7.13 or MTW, p. 651.)
